title: Customs and Border Protection Officers
description: Investigate and inspect persons, common carriers, goods, and merchandise, arriving in or departing from the United States or between states to detect violations of immigration and customs laws and regulations.

tasks.text: Examine immigration applications, visas, and passports and interview persons to determine eligibility for admission, residence, and travel in the U.S.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Detain persons found to be in violation of customs or immigration laws and arrange for legal action, such as deportation.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inspect cargo, baggage, and personal articles entering or leaving U.S. for compliance with revenue laws and U.S. customs regulations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Locate and seize contraband, undeclared merchandise, and vehicles, aircraft, or boats that contain such merchandise.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Interpret and explain laws and regulations to travelers, prospective immigrants, shippers, and manufacturers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Institute civil and criminal prosecutions and cooperate with other law enforcement agencies in the investigation and prosecution of those in violation of immigration or customs laws.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Testify regarding decisions at immigration appeals or in federal court.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Record and report job-related activities, findings, transactions, violations, discrepancies, and decisions.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Determine duty and taxes to be paid on goods.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Collect samples of merchandise for examination, appraisal, or testing.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Investigate applications for duty refunds and petition for remission or mitigation of penalties when warranted.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
